labels.name: needs-triage
labels.description: Inbound; awaiting AI or human triage pass.

labels.name: ai-resolved
labels.description: Closed by AI triage (KNOWN_ISSUES match or duplicate). Reply to reopen for human review.

labels.name: needs-human
labels.description: AI flagged for human follow-up: security_critical, low-confidence, or re-comment on ai-resolved.

labels.name: bug
labels.description: Something is broken in shipped behavior.

labels.name: enhancement
labels.description: Feature request or improvement to existing behavior.

labels.name: documentation
labels.description: Docs are wrong, missing, or unclear.

labels.name: question
labels.description: Usage / how-to (should usually be filed as a Discussion; AI will redirect).

labels.name: build-failure
labels.description: ESP-IDF or composite-device build broke; include Job ID.

labels.name: duplicate
labels.description: Duplicate of an existing issue.

labels.name: p0-critical
labels.description: Drop everything: data loss, security, or blocking BETA broadly.

labels.name: p1-high
labels.description: Next office-hours session; clear blocker for some users.

labels.name: p2-medium
labels.description: Address within the current sprint window.

labels.name: p3-low
labels.description: Nice to have; no committed timeline.

labels.name: triaging
labels.description: Triage is in progress (AI partial-result or human reviewing).

labels.name: in-progress
labels.description: Maintainer is actively working on this.

labels.name: blocked
labels.description: Waiting on upstream, hardware, or external party.

labels.name: needs-info
labels.description: Awaiting reproduction, Job ID, or clarifying answer from reporter.

labels.name: area/wizard
labels.description: Browser wizard UI (type-driven-ui) surface.

labels.name: area/mcp
labels.description: MCP servers (espctl, idfmcp, browser-side surface).

labels.name: area/cli
labels.description: espctl CLI and local tooling.

labels.name: area/agent
labels.description: Aegis agent (remote builder, runner, podman side).

labels.name: area/control-plane
labels.description: Aegis control plane (esphome.cloud, signaling, grants, billing).

labels.name: client/claude-code
labels.description: Reporter using Claude Code as their AI client.

labels.name: client/cursor
labels.description: Reporter using Cursor.

labels.name: client/codex
labels.description: Reporter using Codex CLI.

labels.name: client/opencode
labels.description: Reporter using OpenCode.

labels.name: client/desktop
labels.description: Reporter using Claude Desktop or another non-coding-agent client.

labels.name: spam
labels.description: Bulk-close target; AI-classified spam.

labels.name: out-of-scope
labels.description: Outside the esphome.cloud BETA mission (e.g., OTA fleet management, multi-tenant teams).

labels.name: good-first-issue
labels.description: Suitable starter task for a new contributor.
